steps.title: Connect claim to evidence
steps.content: The previous sentence says the 1965 parade was one of many diplomacy-related ticker-tape parades. The next sentence gives a broad total: seventy-three such parades from 1886 to 2022.

steps.title: Choose a summary transition
steps.content: A signals contrast, B signals restatement, and D signals a direct consequence. The sentence instead summarizes the larger pattern after a specific example. The answer is C.
